title: Ability to edit email sequences without terminating them for those enrolled
excerpt: It would be amazing if we could tweak email sequences without having to stop the sequence entirely for those enrolled. We have an ongoing need to update links and tweak email sequence copy to optimize marketing strategy …

posts.author: Desi (Desi)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be amazing if we could tweak email sequences without having to stop the sequence entirely for those enrolled. We have an ongoing need to update links and tweak email sequence copy to optimize marketing strategy and test alternatives, but when the sequence is stopped prematurely, we lose important metrics that could help us a lot. In addition to losing metrics, we also then can’t keep track of what leads missed portions of our sequences, diminishing our chances of converting those leads. So we’re losing a lot! Please add the ability to edit email sequences without having to stop those sequences entirely for those enrolled. Thank you!
